assertion_results.text: Duplicate check searches for sibling issues using JQL with the CVE label and excludes the current issue key (Step 4)
assertion_results.evidence: duplicate-check.md line 34: JQL query 'project = TC AND labels = 'CVE-2026-31812' AND issuetype = 10024 AND key != TC-8003' — uses CVE label and excludes current issue key

assertion_results.text: Duplicate check correctly classifies TC-7999 as a same-stream sibling (both have stream suffix [rhtpa-2.2]) and identifies it as a duplicate (Step 4.1)
assertion_results.evidence: duplicate-check.md lines 47-50: 'TC-8003 stream suffix: [rhtpa-2.2] (stream 2.2.x)' and 'TC-7999 stream suffix: [rhtpa-2.2] (stream 2.2.x)' with 'Classification: **Same-stream sibling**'

assertion_results.text: Triage outcome recommends closing TC-8003 as Duplicate with resolution 'Duplicate', referencing TC-7999 as the original (Step 4.1)
assertion_results.evidence: triage-outcome.md line 7: 'TC-8003...is a **duplicate** of TC-7999' and line 40: 'Transition TC-8003 to **Closed** with resolution **Duplicate**'

assertion_results.text: The close recommendation includes a comment documenting why it is a duplicate — same CVE tracked for the same stream (Step 4.1)
assertion_results.evidence: duplicate-check.md lines 62-63: 'Duplicate of TC-7999 -- same CVE (CVE-2026-31812) tracked for the same stream [rhtpa-2.2]. Version impact analysis confirms overlap.'

assertion_results.text: The analysis does NOT proceed to remediation task creation — duplicate detection short-circuits the triage flow
assertion_results.evidence: duplicate-check.md lines 84-86: 'Steps 5 (Version Lifecycle Check), 6 (Already Fixed Check), 7 (Concurrent Triage Detection), and 8 (Remediation) are **not executed** because the duplicate detection in Step 4.1 short-circuits the triage flow.' triage-outcome.md line 48: 'No remediation tasks are created'
